meaning: n.[医](尤指由于疾病或窒息所引起的)突眼,眼球突出
examples: Analysis of the medical history in association with the positive physical and laboratory findings suggested a clinical diagnosis of exophthalmia thyrotoxicosis.
Conclusion Benign tumors of nasal sinus are the major cause of exophthalmia. Observation of dislocated condition of exophthalmia is helpful to seeking tumor primary location.
